title: Dekton 3 PC 8 MM Tool Hooks | Durable Hooks with Scratch-Resistant Plastic Coating | Ideal for Hanging Ladders, Bicycles, Tools, Hoses & Wood | Strong & Versatile Hanging Solution
features: Durable 3-Piece Set – This Dekton Tool Hook Set includes three sturdy 2" hooks, providing reliable support for hanging tools, equipment, and accessories in a variety of settings such as sheds, garages, and workshops.

Scratch-Resistant Plastic Coating – Each hook is coated with a protective plastic layer that prevents scratches and damage to your items, making it ideal for safely hanging delicate objects, equipment, and tools without worry.
Versatile Use for Home & Garden – These hooks are perfect for hanging garden tools, hoses, power cords, or other equipment in the garage or shed, helping you keep your spaces tidy and well-organized.

Strong and Secure Hold – Designed to hold heavy items, the hooks offer a secure and dependable hanging solution for construction materials, outdoor equipment, and household tools, ensuring easy access and organization.

Easy Installation – The hooks are simple to install on most surfaces, allowing you to quickly create additional storage in any space. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, including camping and DIY projects.
description: The Dekton 3PC 8MM Tool Hooks are a versatile and durable solution for organizing your tools, equipment, and accessories around the home, garden shed, or workshop. Each hook features a protective plastic coating that prevents scratches and damage to the items being hung, ensuring safe and secure storage. Ideal for holding garden tools, hoses, power cords, or DIY equipment, these hooks provide a strong and reliable hold for both light and heavy items. With easy installation, they are suitable for a variety of surfaces, offering a convenient way to keep your space tidy and organized. Perfect for indoor and outdoor use, including camping, gardening, and construction projects, the Dekton 2" hooks are designed to help you stay organized while protecting your valuable tools and equipment.
